test_brier_score.conclusion: gcn_fusion has significantly lower Brier loss than vol_threshold (binary)

test_01_loss.conclusion: gcn_fusion has significantly lower 0-1 loss at operating threshold

notes: vol_threshold_score is raw realized volatility (not a probability). Test 1 compares gcn probability scores against vol binary predictions under the Brier scoring rule. Test 2 compares binary accuracy at each model's selected operating threshold.
